description:
Goal
Add Compiler-owned APIs for source/frontend checking and execution-graph preparation so , REPL helpers, and test support stop stitching those stages together ad hoc.

Signal
-  owns the production path from source/program input to .
- Existing CLI/test callers use those APIs instead of manually calling , , and  in sequence.
- Tests pin the new Compiler surface and preserve existing telemetry behavior.

Strategy
- Expand  into a focused driver facade.
- Keep pass ownership in  and ; only move sequencing/orchestration.
- Land tests first, then switch callers.
title: Compiler spine: move frontend and execution-graph driving into Compiler
